changelog.change: · Added open In YTKPlus safari extension for iPA (enable it in safari manage extension).
· Fixes icon themes not showing on iOS v16.x > v18.x.
· Added 11 new tabs to the Tab Bar, available in the Tab Bar section.
· Improved Sleep Timer with smarter handling and custom timer options.
· General improvements, enhancements, and bug fixes.
· Fixed a regression introduced in the previous version that could cause crashes for some users.
· Added playback recovery to restore the original account state.
· Fixed critical playback crashes and compatibility issues on newer YouTube versions.
· Added track titles, queue view, and swipe gestures to Mini Player.
· Fixed ads occasionally reappearing in Feed.
· Update to v5.5 before 06/06/2026 — older versions will stop working.
· Updated iPA to newer YouTube v21.22

descriptionlist.longdescription:
In-App Purchase: $3.99

In-App Settings:
• Download videos, audio, Shorts, and post images.
• Enjoy full-speed 🚀 downloads with a built-in Download Manager.
• Built in a modern Video and Audio player.
• Built in a modern custom Sleeptimer.
• Import videos to Photos or directly into the YTKPlus library.
• Block all advertisements for a clean experience.
• Play media in the background.
• Stream HD videos over Wi-Fi, 3G, 4G, or 5G.
• Streaming and downloading 2k-4k videos on Supported Device ip15 and later.
• Set default playback quality for Wi-Fi and Cellular.
• Customize or hide tab bar icons and layouts.
• Includes built-in SponsorBlock integration.
• Picture in Picture (PiP).
• And many more settings…
• Supports iPadOS.


IPA & TrollStore Version:
  • Instructions available here...


    • · OR copy this source and add it to ur source list on Altstore, FlekSt0re, Esign etc..
    · https://repo.ikghd.me/repo.json

    Refund Policy:
  • Refund page


    • Subscription | Key & Devices:
    · subscription valid for (99 days)
    · The key is for 1 device and is transferable

    For more information, refer to the FAQ page:
  • FAQ page
